channel.title: Azure AI Language on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure AI Language on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Text Analytics for Health NextGen Playground in Azure AI Language
item.description:
The next-generation Text Analytics for Health (TA4H) playground is now generally available in the Microsoft Foundry portal. It lets users paste clinical text such as discharge summaries, doctor’s notes, or research abstracts for analysis.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: Retirement: Select Azure AI Language Features
item.description:
Microsoft will retire eight Azure AI Language features on March 20, 2027. The notice lists Key Phrase Extraction, Sentiment Analysis and Opinion Mining, Custom Text Classification, Conversational Language Understanding (CLU), Custom Question Answering (CQA), and other related language features.

  • Source: Azure Updates
